text:
EXPLANATION: The Gurobi Optimizer Reference Manual is the official technical documentation for the Gurobi optimization software, which is updated regularly by Gurobi Optimization, LLC. Citations of this manual are standard practice in academic and technical literature to reference the software, and it is a real-world source.
LINK: https://www.gurobi.com/documentation/
FOUND_TITLE: Gurobi Optimizer Reference Manual
FOUND_AUTHORS: Gurobi Optimization, LLC
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
